itinerary.mapNote: Lakeshore then steep climb to bush-line. Luxmore Caves. Panoramic ridge. 1472m.

itinerary.route: Luxmore Hut to Iris Burn Hut
itinerary.mapNote: Spectacular alpine ridge walk. Views of Fiordland peaks and lakes. 570m.
Manapouri lakeside hut. Beech forest. Remote and tranquil. 200m.
Flat lakeside walk back. Rainbow trout visible in crystal water. 210m.

waypoints.name: Mount Luxmore
waypoints.note: Kepler summit. Alpine meadows and one of NZ's great ridge walks.

waypoints.name: Luxmore Caves
waypoints.note: Limestone cave system. Large colony of cave weta inside.

waypoints.name: Lake Te Anau
waypoints.note: NZ's largest South Island lake. Gateway to Fiordland.

waypoints.name: Fiordland
waypoints.note: 20,000km² of raw Fiordland wilderness visible from the ridge.
